title: Senior Financial Analyst - Axis Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Axis Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Axis Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Axis Bank:
Axis Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank!
